Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class MembershipGoalImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.MembershipGoalImpl
public class MembershipGoalImpl extends Object
Common implementation of the Membership goal reasoner and tactic.

    • search

      private Rationale search(Goal goal)
      Tells whether there is a proof for the goal from hypotheses. The member variable tried is used to prevent looping.
      Parameters:
      goal - membership to discharge
      Returns:
      a justification for the given membership
